Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion To Enter Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

American Express National Bank's unopposed "motion to enter judgment pursuant to CCP 664.6" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
